response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, plus direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest — aligning well with the core stack and responsibilities. His open-source contributions, architectural versatility, and deep testing/DevOps practice demonstrate senior-level ownership. Concerns include lack of explicit Nest.js or Kotlin/Java project mentions and limited evidence of enterprise automation tooling focus, though his broad experience compensates.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native tools (AWS CDK, Docker)
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, matching a key required skill
Strong testing culture with Vitest/Jest exposure and multiple open-source testing tools developed
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin/Java in recent roles, though Java/DLang experience exists
Limited evidence of enterprise internal tooling focus — more product/external-facing projects shown
German language proficiency is basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based team
